adzunaAppId.title: Adzuna App ID
adzunaAppId.description: Required Adzuna API application ID. Get your own credentials from Adzuna.

adzunaAppKey.title: Adzuna App Key
adzunaAppKey.description: Required Adzuna API key. This actor does not ship with shared credentials.

countries.title: Countries
countries.description: Adzuna country codes to search. This actor should remain limited to the United States and Canada.

searchQueries.title: Search queries
searchQueries.description: Role/function searches to run against Adzuna for broad job discovery.

maxPagesPerQuery.title: Max pages per query/country
maxPagesPerQuery.description: Caps broad discovery volume to preserve quality and API budget.

resultsPerPage.title: Results per page
resultsPerPage.description: Number of Adzuna jobs requested per API page. Adzuna caps this at 50, so the actor keeps the maximum at 50.

maxJobAgeDays.title: Maximum job age in days
maxJobAgeDays.description: Stale jobs older than this threshold are excluded.

includeMediumConfidence.title: Include medium confidence rows
includeMediumConfidence.description: When true, emit Medium confidence rows in addition to High and Very High. Low confidence rows are always excluded.

enablePublicEnrichment.title: Enable public web enrichment
enablePublicEnrichment.description: Use no-key public web resources to discover/validate official websites, descriptions, careers evidence, and employee-size evidence.

maxEnrichmentPages.title: Max public pages per company
maxEnrichmentPages.description: Limits no-key public web enrichment requests per discovered company.

greenhouseBoardTokens.title: Greenhouse board tokens
greenhouseBoardTokens.description: Optional no-key Greenhouse public board tokens to ingest alongside Adzuna. These are public board identifiers, not API keys.

leverCompanySlugs.title: Lever company slugs
leverCompanySlugs.description: Optional no-key Lever company slugs to ingest alongside Adzuna. These are public posting identifiers, not API keys.
